title: Clean PR — well-structured utility function
author: contributor
pr_description: Adds a safe average utility with edge-case handling.
diff:
--- a/utils.py
+++ b/utils.py
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+def safe_average(values):
+    """Return mean of values, or 0.0 for empty input."""
+    if not values:
+        return 0.0
+    return sum(values) / len(values)
